title: What happens to Shinji after he has an anxiety attack in Q
display_title: What happens to Shinji after he has an anxiety attack in Q
wikitext:
[]: What happens to Shinji after he has an anxiety attack in Q?             Quote Post by unitM » Mon Jul 13, 2015 9:59 pm I don't think this has been discussed before but I think it could be worthwhile to discuss. In Q, Shinji faints when Rei Q rejects Shinji's attempt at keeping his shit together("I saved you back then, right Rei?!"). He has a mind trip moment and wakes up in his room, angrily asking himself what he was doing. Shinji had fainted or gone unconscious, as is suggested. However, he wakes up in a different room, on his bed. Did Rei bring him here? It's not really suggested, though Rei Q shows a strange amount of concern just before Shinji starts tripping out. It's also not revealed the elapsed time between him fainting, and him being apparently placed back on his bed. Shinji also shows he has no idea, and even if he did, he seems to embarrassed about it or angry at the world to notice. I personally did not spot anything suspicious in his trip scene. It's hard to avoid getting lost in the scene, but if you look carefully, you can see Shinji's surroundings. Nothing seemed out of place. What do you think?[/list]

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jul 13, 2015 10:02 pm Do you mean the anxiety scene with the close up on his eye? I don't believe he fainted or anything. I think it was just a cut transition, showing him at the peak of his panic attack, contrasted with the quiet confinement in his room afterward.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Mon Jul 13, 2015 10:07 pm Sachi wrote: Do you mean the anxiety scene with the close up on his eye? I don't believe he fainted or anything. I think it was just a cut transition, showing him at the peak of his panic attack, contrasted with the quiet confinement in his room afterward.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jul 13, 2015 10:15 pm I imagine he just flailed around a bit in a tantrum while making his way back to his safe spot/his room. IIRC, it was the next cut that he see him throw his SDAT at the wall in frustration, right? Showing that his normal method of consoling himself has failed.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jul 13, 2015 10:47 pm Sachi beat me to the punch on this one. I don't think Shinji fainted-- rather, Anno probably just didn't show us Shinji staggering his way back to his room.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Mon Jul 13, 2015 10:54 pm A part of me finds that difficult to imagine with Rei's would-be sobering response and attitude. It certainly is plausible though, considering the gap of events is open for discussion for a reason.
